title: GLM-5.2 发布：1M 上下文窗口，MIT 开源权重
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Lets go, GLM-5.2 released as Open Weights model.
tl;dr
-1M context window
-MIT-licensed open weights
-Stronger long-horizon coding agents
-Two reasoning modes: max and high
-Same API pricing as GLM-5.1
Zai says GLM-5.2 was trained specifically for large-scale implementation, formance optimization, and complex debugging.
Open Source got a serious upgrade today!
Z.ai
@Zai_org
8h
Introducing GLM-5.2: Frontier Intelligence, Open Weights
- Significant improvements in coding and agentic tasks
- Strong long-horizon capabilities with a 1M context window
- Two levels of reasoning effort: GLM-5.2 (max) pushes the limits, while GLM-5.2 (high) strikes a strong Show more
6:15 PM · Jun 16, 2026 40.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: GLM-5.2 发布：1M 上下文窗口，MIT 开源权重
discovery_record.discovery_summary: GLM-5.2 作为开放权重模型发布，采用 MIT 许可，拥有 1M 上下文窗口。提供两种推理模式：max（极限推理）和 high（平衡性能与 token 效率）。在编码和智能体任务上有显著提升，专为大规模实现、自动化研究、性能优化和复杂调试训练。API 定价与 GLM-5.1 保持一致。

key_excerpts.text: GLM-5.2 作为开放权重模型发布，采用 MIT 许可，拥有 1M 上下文窗口。提供两种推理模式：max（极限推理）和 high（平衡性能与 token 效率）。在编码和智能体任务上有显著提升，专为大规模实现、自动化研究、性能优化和复杂调试训练。API 定价与 GLM-5.1 保持一致。
Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus Lets go, GLM-5.
tl;dr -1M context window -MIT-licensed open weights -Stronger long-horizon coding agents -Two reasoning modes: max and high -Same API pricing as GLM-5.
2 was trained specifically for large-scale implementation, formance optimization, and complex debugging.
Open Source got a serious upgrade today!

tl;dr -1M context window -MIT-licensed open weights -Stronger long-horizon coding agents -Two reasoning modes: max and high -Same API pricing as GLM-5.
case_details: GLM-5.2 作为开放权重模型发布，采用 MIT 许可，拥有 1M 上下文窗口。提供两种推理模式：max（极限推理）和 high（平衡性能与 token 效率）。在编码和智能体任务上有显著提升，专为大规模实现、自动化研究、性能优化和复杂调试训练。API 定价与 GLM-5.1 保持一致。
before_after_clues: 可能涉及 计费 / 预算管理 的前后变化，需要二搜补足变化前流程。

guanlan_scores.importance_reason: technical trend or capability shift; rubric=5 major/platform/industry-shaping
